overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a wizard character exploring a Gothic castle interior. The character ascends multiple grand staircases decorated with Halloween pumpkins and portraits, passing other students before exiting to an exterior courtyard at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with stone pillars and ornate railings

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase with ornate wooden railings and wall sconces

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with wooden steps and ornate railings
tall stone column supporting the arched ceiling
decorative wooden balustrade with carved details
lit wall-mounted lantern with warm golden light
high vaulted ceiling with Gothic architectural details
large hanging chandelier with multiple candles

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a grand stone staircase within a Gothic castle hall. Warm light from wall sconces and a distant chandelier illuminates the ornate railings and tall stone pillars as the character climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: central hall with equestrian statue and Halloween decorations

events.description: reaches the top of the main staircase and enters the central hall featuring a large equestrian statue
turns left and begins ascending the secondary staircase

agents.ego_description: crossing the upper landing past the central statue and turning onto the left staircase

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking near the equestrian statue

entered.detail: large stone statue of a figure on horseback on a raised pedestal
carved Halloween pumpkins with glowing faces arranged around the statue base
wooden balcony with railings overlooking the central hall
secondary stone staircase branching off to the left

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper landing, the character enters a spacious central hall dominated by a large equestrian statue surrounded by glowing Halloween pumpkins. After crossing the marble floor, the character turns left to ascend a secondary staircase while a student walks nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: portrait gallery staircase with framed paintings

events.description: enters the portrait-lined corridor on the upper levels

agents.ego_description: climbing the staircase past numerous framed portraits on the walls

notable_agents.action: student descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: multiple framed paintings of historical figures lining the walls
ornate wall-mounted lantern with glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrower staircase lined with framed portraits and illuminated by ornate wall lanterns. Another student descends the stairs in the opposite direction as the character continues climbing through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper grand staircase approaching the main entrance doors

events.description: continues ascending the final flight of stairs alongside other students
reaches and opens the large wooden doors to exit the building

agents.ego_description: climbing the final stairs among groups of students and opening the large wooden exit doors

notable_agents.action: group of students conversing on the right side of the stairs
student walking ahead toward the large wooden doors

entered.detail: tall double doors with intricate geometric carvings and metal handles
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned glass panes
vertical banners with heraldic symbols hanging on the walls
statue of a figure in armor holding a spear

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the final grand staircase where groups of students gather and converse. Tall windows and house banners line the walls leading to large carved wooden doors, which the character opens to exit the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with Halloween decorations and illuminated towers

events.description: exits the warm interior into the cool night air with exterior lantern lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard past Halloween pumpkin displays and scarecrows toward the castle towers

notable_agents.action: group of students standing and talking near the stone balustrade

entered.detail: Gothic castle towers and walls with illuminated windows against the night sky
stone railing with decorative pillars overlooking the courtyard
carved pumpkins with glowing faces placed along the walkway
lit street lamps on stone posts illuminating the courtyard
dark cloudy night sky visible above the castle towers

segments.scene_description: Stepping outside into the night, the character enters a vast courtyard illuminated by outdoor lanterns and the warm glow of castle windows. Halloween pumpkins and scarecrows decorate the stone pathways as other students gather near the balustrades, with the imposing Gothic castle towers rising against the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent through the ornate interior of a Gothic castle that eventually opens into a sprawling moonlit courtyard. It begins with the character climbing a grand stone staircase illuminated by warm wall sconces and a distant chandelier before emerging onto a spacious upper landing featuring a large equestrian statue and glowing Halloween pumpkins. The camera then follows the character as they transition through a narrower corridor lined with framed portraits and lanterns, passing another student while climbing toward a final grand staircase adorned with house banners. As the character moves past gathering groups of students, the scene shifts from the enclosed stone halls to the outdoors upon opening a set of large carved wooden doors. Finally, the view expands into a vast night courtyard where stone pathways decorated with scarecrows lead toward imposing castle towers under a cloudy sky.
